info.title: TruthOrigin Snapshot Protocol CLI Tool
info.description: Protocol native HTML snapshotting for SPAs and WASM apps. Enabling SEO, pre-rendering, and decentralized Web3/IPFS routing.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: SnapshotTool - Static Snapshot Generator for WASM wwwroot folders

options.name: --folder
options.description: The path to the published wwwroot of your WASM project.

options.name: --key
options.description: OPTIONAL. API key for future authenticated services.

options.name: --show
options.description: OPTIONAL. Launch the browser in visible (non-headless) mode.
